creator: ak03@gte.com
text:
pspell-ispell port in the ports three has the version number 0.10.2,
	while pspell, on which it depends, is at 0.12.x already. Pspell-ispell
	fails to compile as a result.

Fix: The patch below updates port with the latest version. It builds
	and appears to work on both -STABLE and -CURRENT.
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
